make-a-delicious-ham-and-gouda-cheese-wr.name: Make A Delicious Ham And Gouda Cheese Wrap
make-a-delicious-ham-and-gouda-cheese-wr.original_name: Haz un delicioso wrap de jamón y queso gouda

ingredients.item: Hojas de lechuga fresca ((cantidad al gusto))

instructions: Coloca una tortilla de harina sobre una superficie plana.

In a cup, join the mayonnaise and mustard. That step's optional, if you don't have to do it that way, you can add sauces separately. Whatever decision you make, the next step is to put together a uniform layer of the salsa.
Add ham, gouda cheese, lettuce leaves and cherry tomatoes. At this point, the ideal is to add 100 grams of ham and cheese per omelette
Espolvorea con pimienta al gusto.
Wrap with care and make sure that all the ingredients are well distributed. Stretch firmly and make a diagonal cut to the wrap.
Before serving, place each wrap at least one minute at a time till cheese melts. That will add more flavour. Nevertheless, this step is optional.

make-some-delicious-peppers-stuffed-with.name: Make Some Delicious Peppers Stuffed With Cod
make-some-delicious-peppers-stuffed-with.original_name: Haz unos deliciosos pimientos rellenos de bacalao

ingredients.item: 200 ml of liquid cream for cooking ((optional))

instructions: If the cod is salted, you have to get rid of it earlier (leave it in cold water for 24-48 hours, changing water every 8 hours). Once despaired, scrape them into small pieces.
In a large frying pan, add some olive oil and sock the chopped onion with garlic and green pepper, both finely cut. Cooking till tender and slightly golden.

Add the frying cod to the frying and cook for about 5 minutes with medium heat, stirring so that flavors are well integrated. Add the fried tomato and mix well. If you prefer a more creamy texture, add the liquid cream at this time and let them reduce for a few minutes. Retirement with salt and pepper.

If you use fresh peppers, put them into the oven at 180 ″ 3 ″ for about 25 minutes till the skin has been soft. Then hit them and remove the seeds. If you wear canned peppers, just rinse them and get them well.
Carefully fill each pepper with the cod mix, using a small spoon to avoid breaking them.

Prepare a soft bezel by melting butter into a frying pan, adding flour and cooking till it takes a clear golden tone. Fold milk little by little while you scold to avoid clumps and get a thick and homogenous salsa. Hail to taste.
place stuffed peppers in an oven fountain, cover with bechamel and baker at 180 ″ 3 ″ for about 10-15 minutes, till the top is golden.
Sirve caliente, decorado con perejil fresco picado.

mango-relish.name: Mango Relish
instructions: Combine mango, oil, bell pepper, scallions, cilantro, and lime juice in a small bowl. Stir to combine. Season with salt, pepper, and honey. Refrigerate or serve immediately.

mango-sumac-yogurt-semifreddo.name: Mango-sumac Yogurt Semifreddo

ingredients.item: Plain whole-milk greek yogurt or labneh

instructions: Cook 3 medium ripe mangoes, peeled, coarsely chopped (about 4 cups), ⅓ cup (67 g) granulated sugar, 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and a pinch of kosher salt in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring often and smashing fruit with a wooden spoon, until thick and jammy, 15–18 minutes. Using an immersion blender (or transferring to a standard blender), blend until smooth; stir in 2 tsp. sumac. Let mango purée cool.

Whisk 1 cup sweetened condensed milk, ½ cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt or labneh, ½ tsp. vanilla extract, and a big pinch of salt in a medium bowl to combine, then stir in 1 oz. bittersweet chocolate, finely chopped.

Using an electric mixer on medium-high, beat 2 cups heavy cream in a small bowl until stiff peaks form. Transfer 1 cup whipped cream to bowl with yogurt mixture and gently fold to combine. Scrape yogurt mixture into bowl with remaining whipped cream and gently fold to combine (be careful; you don’t want to deflate the cream).

Transfer a third of cream mixture to a 9x5" loaf pan and spread into an even layer. Top with a third of mango purée and swirl to create ribbons and pockets of purée throughout cream mixture. Repeat process of layering and swirling 2 more times, dividing remaining cream mixture and purée evenly between layers. Smooth surface and cover tightly with plastic wrap. Freeze until solid, at least 8 hours.

Let semifreddo sit at room temperature 10 minutes before scooping into bowls.
Do ahead: Semifreddo can be made 5 days ahead. Keep frozen.

maple-baked-hasselback-apple.name: Maple Baked Hasselback Apple
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C (200°C).
Peel the apple and cut in half.  Using a melon baller, carve out the core of the apple halves.

Using a sharp knife, make vertical incisions into the apple, about a quarter of an inch apart, without cutting all the way through the apple halves.  (You can use a set of chopsticks as safety bumpers to make sure that your knife can’t cut all the way through.)
In a small bowl, mix together the maple syrup, nutmeg, and cinnamon.  Use a pastry brush to coat the apple halves with the maple spice mixture.
Bake for 30 minutes until the apples are tender and lightly browned.
Top each apple half with a small scoop of frozen yogurt and a sprinkle of chopped almonds and serve.
Enjoy!

maple-honey-mustard-sauce.name: Maple Honey Mustard Sauce
instructions: Combine creamy dressing, honey, maple mustard, vinegar, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper in a measuring cup until fully blended.

marinated-summer-vegetables.name: Marinated Summer Vegetables

ingredients.prep: orange, or yellow bell peppers, cut into 1 inch strips

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 475°. Place squash and peppers on separate baking sheets. Drizzle each sheet of vegetables with 1/2 tablespoon oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss to coat. Spread out in a single layer, turning peppers skin side up.
Roast peppers on upper rack and squash on lower rack, turning squash once, until tender, 15–20 minutes. Let cool slightly; remove skins from peppers.
Whisk garlic, vinegar, and remaining 3 tablespoons oil in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add vegetables and oregano; toss to coat. Cover and let sit at least 1 hour.
DO AHEAD: Vegetables can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill; bring to room temperature before serving.

marmalade-with-port-wine-teleculinaria.name: Marmalade With Port Wine

ingredients.item: Water and salt biscuits to accompany

instructions: Wash the quinces thoroughly, remove their lumps and cut them into pieces. Put it in a pot with some water covering the bottom, add the sugar and Port wine and bring it to the fire.
When the quinces are cooked, crush with the magic wand until you get a puree. Take the light again until you figure it out.
Put the marmalade in bowls or small containers and let it cool completely. Disfigure and serve with water and salt cookies.

mashed-potato-croquettes.name: Mashed Potato Croquettes
instructions: Mix egg yolks, mashed potatoes, Parmesan, chives, and flour in a medium bowl. Roll into walnut-size balls; chill until cold, at least 2 hours.

Beat eggs in a bowl; place breadcrumbs in another bowl. Pour vegetable oil into a medium skillet to measure ½” (about 2 cups) and heat over medium-high until a pinch of breadcrumbs bubbles immediately when added. Dip potato balls in egg, then roll in breadcrumbs. Working in batches, fry, turning often, until golden brown and crisp, 3–4 minutes. Drain on paper towels.

meat-roll-mortadella-and-cheese-teleculi.name: Meat Roll, Mortadella And Cheese
meat-roll-mortadella-and-cheese-teleculi.original_name: Rolo de carne, mortadela e queijo

ingredients.item: 800 g de carne de vaca picada

instructions: Descasque, lave e pique a cebola e os dentes de alho. Numa tigela, junte a carne picada, a cebola, os alhos, um pouco de salsa picada e o ovo, tempere com sal e pimenta e misture muito bem.
Line the oven tray with a foil foil, spread over the mixture of meat and smooth. Then have the slightly overlapping bologna slices, as you see in the photo.
Then place the cheese slices, also partially overlapping but only next to one end.

Wrap with the help of aluminum foil, reject the foil, pass by grated bread, re-use the tray, water with olive oil and take the preheated oven at 180°C for 40 minutes. However, make the sauce: in a pot, dilute the powder of the mushroom soup in the water and cream, take it to the fire and let it boil until thicken. Remove the roll from the oven, cut it into slices and serve it watered with the sauce. Follow with sauteed spaghetti.

mezcal-sour.name: Mezcal Sour
instructions: Combine 2 oz. mezcal, 1 oz. fresh lime juice, and 1 oz. Simple Syrup (see recipe) in a cocktail shaker. Fill shaker with ice, cover, and shake vigorously until outside of shaker is very cold, about 30 seconds.
Strain cocktail into a Nick & Nora or rocks glass. Garnish with maraschino cherries.

milk-chocolate-mousse-with-port-ganache-.name: Milk Chocolate Mousse With Port Ganache And Whipped Crème Fraîche
instructions: Boil 1 1/4 cups Port in heavy medium saucepan until reduced to 1/4 cup, about 9 minutes.

Meanwhile, simmer cream and butter in small saucepan. Remove from heat. Add chocolate; whisk until smooth. Stir 2 tablespoons Port reduction into chocolate mixture. Add 1/2 cup Port and 1 tablespoon sugar to Port reduction. Boil until syrup coats spoon thickly, 6 to 7 minutes.

Whisk yolks, 2 tablespoons water, 2 tablespoons cream, and sugar in heavy medium saucepan. Stir over medium-low heat until custard thickens enough to coat spoon, about 5 minutes (do not boil). Remove from heat. Add chocolate; stir until smooth. Transfer chocolate mixture to medium bowl. Using electric mixer, beat egg whites in another medium bowl until soft peaks form. Fold whites into chocolate mixture in 2 additions. Beat 8 tablespoons cream in another medium bowl until peaks form. Fold cream into chocolate mixture. Cover; chill at least 6 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Keep chilled.
Using electric mixer, beat cream in medium bowl until soft peaks form. Fold in crème fraîche.
Rewarm ganache in microwave in 10-second intervals until warm. Rewarm Port syrup, thinning with Port by 1/2 teaspoonfuls if too thick.

Bring small saucepan of water almost to boil. Spoon 2 tablespoons warm ganache onto center of each of 8 plates. Dip large tablespoon into hot water; shake off excess. Starting at 1 edge of mousse, pull tablespoon in horizontal position across surface of mousse, forming oval-shaped scoop. Place mousse in center of ganache. Repeat procedure for each serving, dipping spoon into hot water and shaking off excess between scoops. Using slightly smaller spoon, repeat procedure to scoop whipped crème fraîche. Place 1 scoop of whipped crème fraîche alongside mousse on each plate. Drizzle warm Port syrup around ganache on each plate.

mini-burger-buns.name: Mini Burger Buns
instructions: Add the lukewarm water to a 2-cup liquid measuring cup or medium bowl.  Add the yeast and sugar and stir to combine. Let sit for 5–10 minutes, until frothy and doubled in volume.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour and salt. Add the butter, egg, and the yeast mixture and stir with a rubber spatula into a shaggy dough.

Turn the dough out onto a clean surface and knead until smooth and soft, about 4 minutes. Place the dough in a clean large bowl lightly greased with nonstick spray and cover with a towel. Let rest until in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 204°C ( 200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Lightly grease a clean surface and place the dough on top. Pat down with your hands to about  ¼-inch thick. Use a ¾-inch (2-cm) round cutter to cut out small circles. Place on the prepared baking sheet.
Brush the tops of the buns with melted butter, then bake for 7–10 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown.
Remove the buns from the oven and brush with more melted butter while they are still warm. Let cool for at least 5 minutes before serving.
Enjoy!

mini-chocolate-vegan-tart.name: Mini Chocolate Vegan Tart
instructions: To make the crust, melt margarine for 30 seconds, stopping every 15 to check if melted.
Mix melted margarine into the crushed Oreos inside the bowl you’ll be serving the tart in.
In another bowl or glass cup, melt the dark chocolate and milk or creamer together for 20-30 seconds. Add this into the crust.
Refrigerate for 30 mins.
Top with vegan whipped cream and Oreo crumbles. Serve and enjoy.

mini-peanut-butter-chocolate-cheesecakes.name: Mini Peanut Butter Chocolate Cheesecakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
Mix graham cracker crumbs, butter, and brown sugar together in a bowl. Spoon evenly into the prepared muffin cups and press to flatten.

Beat cream cheese in a mixing bowl with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Mix in white sugar and vanilla until fluffy. Mix in milk, then eggs, one at a time; mix until smooth. Transfer 1/2 of the batter to a separate bowl.
Add peanut butter to one bowl of the cream cheese mixture; beat until well blended. Divide mixture among the muffin cups.
Add melted chocolate chips to the remaining cream cheese mixture and beat until creamy and smooth. Pour into the muffin cups and sprinkle chopped peanuts over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until almost set, 20 to 25 minutes. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack until completely cooled. Enjoy immediately or refrigerate before serving.

monastery-fennel-pies-argiro.name: Monastery Fennel Pies

ingredients.item: 11⁄2 kg different wild greens of the mountain
11⁄2 kg different wild greens of the mountain

instructions: Clean and wash the greens, spinach and drain well.
In a pot added olive oil and sauté the leaves and the fresh versions until they become transparent.
Add the greens and spinach and let them drink all their liquids.
Add salt and pepper.
Place the filling in a colander and place weight on it to drain well.
Then add the fennel and toast.

moroccan-chicken-ras-el-hanout-tradition.name: Moroccan Chicken Ras El Hanout (traditional Recipe)
moroccan-chicken-ras-el-hanout-tradition.original_name: Pollo Ras el Hanout marroquí (receta tradicional)

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons ra the hanout (you can buy here)
Bean black pepper (you can buy here)

instructions: In a large bowl we mix the oil with the frosted garlic, the juice and the frosted lemon skin, a pellet of salt and the spices the hanout. We embed well the pieces of chicken with this blend, we cover and let marinate in the refrigerator about 2 hours (or all night if you want a more intense taste).

We purify the oven at 200 ″ 3 ″, heat up and down. We put the chicken pieces on an oven plate with skin up. We baked about 35- 40 minutes. If your oven has a grill, the last 10 minutes will suit it so that the skin will get good.
While we have the chicken in the oven, we cook the white rice. We propose a basmati rice, but it can be anything you have at home.

moussaka-without-eggplants-argiro.name: Moussaka Without Eggplants
instructions: First add the minced meat to the olive oil in a strong heat and after changing color add the onion, carrot and garlic.
Allow the onion to soften for a few minutes and put it out with the cognac.
After the alcohol evaporates completely, add the tomatoes and the laurel.
Add salt and pepper and simmer for 20 minutes, to drink its liquids.
After the minced meat has become, add a bowl of bechamel and mix.
As long as the minced meat is done, we prepare the rice.

muhammara-the-syrian-dip-or-cream-of-red.name: Muhammara, The Syrian Dip Or Cream Of Red Peppers And Walnuts To Spread
muhammara-the-syrian-dip-or-cream-of-red.original_name: Muhammara, el dip o crema siria de pimientos rojos y nueces para untar

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons pomegranate molasses (you can buy here)
2 tablespoons of lemon or lime juice
1 teaspoon ground cumin (you can buy here)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been. Wash the Red Peppers and place them on an oven plate. Roast the peppers in the oven for about 30 to 40 minutes and turn them occasionally, until they are well roasted and the skin is wrinkled and slightly carbonized. Withdraw the pits from the oven and place them in a bowl. Cover them with paper and let them rest for about 10 minutes. That will help your skin get out easily.

Peel the roasted peppers, remove the seeds and cut them into pieces. In a food processor, add roasted peppers, pitted nuts, padded bread, tomato paste, pomegranate molasses, lemon juice, garlic teeth, cumin, peppermint, cayenne pepper (if you wish) and salt to taste. Triple the ingredients up to a smooth and homogenous blend.

While the food processor's functioning, it gradually adds extra virgin olive oil to achieve the desired consistency. Add about 1 / 4 cup of oil, but you can adjust the quantity according to your texture preferences.
Test the muhammara and tighten the condiments according to your personal taste. Add more salt, lemon juice or spices if necessary.

multigrain-hot-cereal-with-pomegranate-s.name: Multigrain Hot Cereal With Pomegranate Seeds And Spiced Pepita And Cashew Crunch

ingredients.prep: such as Bob’s Red Mill 10 Grain

instructions: Prepare multigrain cereal according to package directions. Top with pomegranate seeds and Spiced Pepita and Cashew Crunch; drizzle with nut or soy milk.

musakhan-sumac-chicken-with-onions-and-f.name: Musakhan (sumac Chicken With Onions And Flatbread)

ingredients.prep: thigh and drumstick; about 2 0.5 lb. total

ingredients.item: Taboon bread or turkish or indian flatbreads

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Mix allspice, cardamom, cumin, and 2 Tbsp. sumac in a small bowl to combine.
Season chicken all over with salt in a large bowl. Rub with half of spice mix, pressing and working it into the meat.

Heat ¼ cup oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken, turning occasionally, until golden brown on both sides and some fat is released, 3–5 minutes per side. Transfer chicken to a large plate, leaving fat in skillet.

Return skillet to medium-high heat. Cook onions, scraping any browned bits on bottom of skillet and adding a splash of water if pan gets dry, until softened and golden brown, 18–25 minutes. Sprinkle with remaining spice mix and continue to cook, stirring frequently, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add ¼ cup water, season with salt, and bring to a simmer. Nestle chicken back into skillet, skin side up, and transfer to oven. Bake, uncovered, until liquid is mostly evaporated and chicken is cooked through, 30–35 minutes. Let cool 10 minutes in skillet.

While chicken is cooking, toast pine nuts in remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a small skillet over medium heat, stirring frequently, until golden brown and fragrant, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and season with salt.

Arrange warmed bread on a platter and top with chicken and onions. Scatter pine nuts over and sprinkle with more sumac. Squeeze juice from one lemon half over chicken. Cut remaining lemon half into wedges to serve alongside.

mushroom-ceviche-recipe-comedera.name: Mushroom Ceviche, Recipe
instructions: We will start our recipe, cutting mushrooms into thin slices that should be previously washed.
That's how you're gonna put the mushroom frills into a bowl.
Then you'll add the chopped onion.
Also the chopped tomato, the tanked cilantro manjo, salt and pepper to taste. The lemons juice. Mix to integrate everything.
Una vez integrado, deja reposar por 30 minutos en el refrigerador para que todos los sabores se integren perfectamente.
After that time, you can enjoy your ceviche.
Degusta!

ingredients.item: 3 cups hot chicken water or water
You can get different textures using honeydo, jasmin or basmati rice.
You can choose vegetable water instead of chicken water and give a lighter and aromatic character of the battery.

myzithropita-with-puff-pastry-argiro.name: Myzithropita With Puff Pastry
instructions: First remove from the refrigerator and allow the puff pastry leaf to thaw.
Open on floured parchment paper and roll it with the molder to make it thinner.
Place the myzithra in a bowl and melt with a fork.
Add the powder and egg and mix the ingredients.
Drain the spoons and chop them.
Add them to myzithra, along with the zest and chocolate pieces.
Mix the ingredients.
Spread the filling on the puff pastry, leaving 3 to 4 cm empty around.
With a sharp knife, cut the gaps of the puff pastry slightly around.
We turn them onto the filling, creating a case to keep it inside.
Beat the yolk, sugar and milk in a bowl and spread all the sweet.
Sprinkle with almond fillet and gently, with our palms, press the almonds on the filling.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 200oC with air, on the middle grill of the oven for 10 minutes and then lower the temperature to 170oC for 20 minutes, until the puff pastry is brown.
Allow the sweet to cool and steam before serving.

30-minute-pizza-party-boats.name: 30-minute Pizza Party Boats
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the loaves of bread cut-side up on the prepared baking sheet.
In a small bowl, combine the the olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Brush over the bread.
Bake for 10 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and dried out.
Top the bread with the toppings of your choice. You can mix and match any flavor combinations you prefer!
For Meat Lovers pizza, add marinara sauce, mozzarella, mozzarella, pepperoni, sausage, ham, and bacon.
For Alfredo Veggie pizza, add alfredo sauce, spinach, artichokes, mushrooms, Parmesan, and sun-dried tomatoes.
For Barbecue Chicken Pizza, add barbecue sauce, chicken, pepper Jack, bell pepper, and red onion.
For Prosciutto Pesto Pizza, add pesto, prosciutto, roasted red pepper, Parmesan, eggs, and pepper.
Bake the pizza party boats for 15 minutes, or until the ingredients are heated through and the cheese is fully melted.
Slice and serve!
Enjoy!
